question.label: Mentoring stalled
question.name: You said 'more mentoring' — what's kept that from happening so far?
question.description: Drills into the stalled mentoring thread to surface the real blocker.

answer: Honestly — the billing rewrite. I've heard whispers but nobody's talked to me about it directly. That's a bit weird.

assessment.note: Names a concrete blocker to mentoring — unclear involvement in the billing rewrite and lack of direct communication — which signals stalled growth support.

new_queue.label: Billing rewrite weird
new_queue.name: On the billing rewrite — what's weird about how it's being handled from your seat?

new_queue.label: Mentoring trade-off
new_queue.name: What would you need to drop to make space for mentoring?

new_queue.label: Next-step close
new_queue.name: What's the first concrete thing you want to have moved by our next conversation?

history.answer_excerpt: Last two weeks were intense — shipping payments was a sprint but it landed clean. Mostly good energy but definitely coasting a bit this week
Cleanup and docs for payments, reviewing PRs for the new team members. Not much stretching me right now.
Nothing big. A lot of context-switching on reviews — probably fine, but it adds up.
I'd like to do more mentoring. I brought it up maybe three months ago and nothing came of it. I'm not pushing.
